purpose: Demo-only Release 1 asset, document, import staging, and validation queue data. No real asset, certification, legal, RBI, RLA, FFS, fit-for-operation, layak operasi, or safety decision is represented.
sourceBasis: Data Model Pack/PRD URS/UI UX Design Pack/Addendum MVP+ Rev. 1
guardrails: Imports remain staged until validation and authorized review.
Document upload API creates metadata/object-key intent only in this release.
Baseline promotion, certification readiness, RBI final output, and evidence-pack export are out of scope.
